content.text:
System: [2026-04-09 07:08:41 EDT] 📬 Gmail Intake Sweep Complete (6:48 AM ET)
System: 
System: CRITICAL ITEMS:
System: 1. 🚨 Suspicious PayPal email - likely phishing, DO NOT CALL (800) 385-8132
System: 2. 🔐 Google account security alert for lhyman.admin@gmail.com
System: 3. 🔐 Google account recovery notification
System: 4. 📱 6 unread Google Voice messages from 30368
System: 
System: ACTION NEEDED:
System: 5. Harvard Graduate School Elections - check deadline
System: 6. Roland Park Pool membership renewal before rate increase
System: 7. Gilman School Library overdue books reminder
System: 
System: FYI: Newsletters from Baltimore Banner, Matthew Yglesias, Jerusalem Demsas. Amazon shipments delivered.
System: 
System: 50 threads scanned. Please review urgent security items.

Read HEARTBEAT.md if it exists (workspace context). Follow it strictly. Do not infer or repeat old tasks from prior chats. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.
When reading HEARTBEAT.md, use workspace file /Users/louishyman/.openclaw/workspace/HEARTBEAT.md (exact case). Do not read docs/heartbeat.md.
Current time: Thursday, April 9th, 2026 — 7:08 AM (America/New_York) / 2026-04-09 11:08 UTC
